---
title: "Cover Positioning Test"
author: "Michael Friendly"
date: today
format:
  pdf:
    documentclass: krantz
    classoption: [10pt, krantz2, titlepage, letterpaper]
    include-in-header: latex/cover-test-header.tex
    keep-tex: true
    output-file: cover-test
---

**This is the first content page.**
The cover should appear *before* this page as page 1.

The crop marks on this page show the **6 × 9 inch trim area**
(krantz2 class, letterpaper).
The cover image in `images/cover/cover-peng-scaled.pdf` should fill
the same 6 × 9 region, centered on the letter page.

To regenerate `cover-peng-scaled.pdf` after adjusting `make-cover-scaled.tex`,
run from the project root:

```bash
xelatex -output-directory=images/cover latex/make-cover-scaled.tex
mv images/cover/make-cover-scaled.pdf images/cover/cover-peng-scaled.pdf
```

Then re-render this file (`quarto render cover-test.qmd`) to check alignment.
